backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a file/folder/note/mission management app, including storage, authorization, upload tracking, and CRUD operations for all entity types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (OrbitDock component, swipe gestures, adaptive feedback) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted catalog of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of every component, hook, and utility in the frontend.
frontend/DRAFT_BASELINE_V114.md: Documents the creation of a new Draft baseline synced 1:1 with Live version 114 as of February 3, 2026, including validation steps, parity checks, and change control rules.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point for the MYL PWA, configuring viewport, favicons, iOS meta tags, the React root div, and service worker registration logic.
frontend/PAUSE_AFTER_RESTORE.md: Change control notice freezing all frontend modifications after the Live v114 restoration, listing prohibited actions and requiring explicit user approval before any further changes.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for MYL, defining app name, icons, theme color, display mode, and other installability metadata.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker for the MYL PWA implementing install/activate lifecycle with precaching, a bounded runtime cache, and network-first fetch strategy with offline fallback.
frontend/PWA_INSTALLABILITY_NOTES.md: Checklist and troubleshooting guide for verifying Chrome PWA installability criteria for the MYL app on Android, covering manifest, service worker, icons, and installation steps.
frontend/RESTORE_LIVE_V114_CHECKLIST.md: A checklist documenting the restoration of the frontend to Live version 114, verifying all core files, components, authentication flow, and UI behavior match the v114 baseline.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, ActorProvider, and UploadProvider, and conditionally renders the IntroScreen on app resume after login.
frontend/src/components/ActorInitErrorSt: Error state UI component displayed when actor initialization fails, showing a classified error message with collapsible technical details and retry/sign-out actions.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedGalleryI: Renders an animated SVG crosshair/target icon with concentric rings, crosshair lines, and corner markers that change color and pulse on hover.
frontend/src/components/CircularBottomNa: A fixed bottom navigation bar with a circular carousel of three items (Upload, Mission, Files) supporting swipe gestures, reduced motion, and per-item click handlers.
frontend/src/components/ConnectivityIndi: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/DecorativeBottom: Renders a fixed, thin horizontal decorative border line near the bottom of the viewport.
frontend/src/components/ExternalOpenFall: A dialog shown when a browser blocks opening a file in a new window, offering retry and download options.
frontend/src/components/FilePreviewDialo: A dialog that previews files (image, video, PDF, Office) and provides actions like download, open in tab, move to folder/mission, and delete.
frontend/src/components/FileUploadSectio: Handles file uploads, link creation, and note creation with progress tracking, dialogs for links/notes, and integration with the upload context.
frontend/src/components/FloatingFileStac: Displays a floating stacked card widget showing recently uploaded files with a count badge, animating new files into the stack before opening a stack view.
frontend/src/components/FoldersButton.ts: A fixed-position button with a folder icon that navigates to the folders view, supporting disabled, overlay-behind, and pulse animation states.
frontend/src/components/FoldersDialog.ts: Deprecated dialog component for managing folders (create, rename, delete, select) with swipe actions; superseded by FoldersFullScreenView and kept only for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/components/FoldersFullScree: Full-screen view for managing folders (create, rename, delete, select) with swipe actions rows and confirmation dialogs; the primary folders UI entry point from HomePage.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenViewer: Full-screen file viewer dialog supporting navigation between files, download, delete, share, send-to-folder, and move-to-mission actions with keyboard and touch swipe support.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Gallery grid component that displays files and notes (in or out of a folder) with support for bulk selection, long-press, full-screen viewing, download, share, delete, and folder/mission assignment.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with an animated logo, theme toggle, sign-out dropdown (when authenticated), and a unified progress bar.
frontend/src/components/HomeSharedElemen: Overlay layer that animates a shared-element transition (opening/closing) between a source button and a target panel for folders or missions, using a cloned element and backdrop blur.
frontend/src/components/IntroScreen.tsx: Displays a full-screen animated splash screen with a gallery icon that fades out over 2 seconds, then calls an onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/LinkOpenFallback: A dialog shown when a browser blocks opening a link in a new window, offering retry and copy-to-clipboard options.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that triggers Internet Identity login, showing a loading spinner while the login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetailFul: Full-screen view for a single mission showing its title, tasks (with toggle/add), attached files, and notes, with autosave support and back-navigation flushing.
frontend/src/components/MissionEditorDia: A dialog for creating a new mission with a title and an editable task list, submitting via a create mutation.
frontend/src/components/MissionsButton.t: A fixed-position floating button with a Target icon that opens the Missions view, supporting pulse animation and overlay z-index control.
frontend/src/components/MissionsFullScre: Full-screen list view of missions split into incomplete and completed tabs, supporting selection, deletion with confirmation, and navigation to mission detail.
frontend/src/components/MobileOnlyLayout: A simple layout wrapper that applies mobile-only CSS container classes to its children.
frontend/src/components/MoveToMissionDia: A dialog that lists available missions and allows the user to move selected files and/or notes into a chosen mission.
frontend/src/components/NoteViewerDialog: A dialog component for viewing a single note that provides actions to send to folder, send to mission, download, share, and delete the note.
frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx: A semi-circular arc navigation dock with three items (Upload, Folders, Mission) that supports swipe gestures, click-to-activate, and micro-animations including an idle upload pulse.
frontend/src/components/SendToFolderDial: A dialog that lists available folders and allows moving selected files and/or notes into a chosen folder or returning them to the main collection.
frontend/src/components/StackFilesFullSc: A full-screen view of stacked files supporting selection, bulk delete, download, share, send-to-folder, move-to-mission, and inline file viewing via a FullScreenViewer.
A swipeable row wrapper that reveals Edit and Delete action buttons on left-swipe using pointer events and translate-based animation.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedProgressB: A fixed top progress bar that displays overall upload progress and counts of active file, link, and note uploads from the UploadContext.
frontend/src/components/UploadQueueRunne: A headless React component that restores and resumes pending file uploads from a persisted queue on mount, processing up to 3 concurrent uploads with progress tracking and cleanup on completion.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeIntroScre: A full-screen welcome/landing page component displaying a branded crosshair SVG logo, introductory text, and a login button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/contexts/ActorContext.tsx: Provides a React context that manages the lifecycle of an authenticated ICP backend actor, including initialization, exponential-backoff retries, error classification, and sign-out.
frontend/src/contexts/UploadContext.tsx: Provides a React context for tracking active and completed file/link/note uploads, exposing methods to start, update progress, complete, restore, and clear upload entries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query-based hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCircularCarousel.t: A hook that manages a 3-item circular carousel, computing x/y/scale/opacity positions along a circular arc (or simple horizontal slide for reduced motion) based on the current index.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomePrefetch.ts: A hook that prefetches folders, files, missions, and notes into the React Query cache once per authenticated session as soon as the backend actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntroOnAppResume.t: Hook that fires a callback when the app returns to the foreground (via visibility change or window focus), but only when the user is authenticated and initialization is complete.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCoarsePointer.ts: Hook that detects whether the device uses a coarse pointer (touch/mobile) via a CSS media query, returning a boolean that updates on pointer type changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissionAutosave.ts: Hook that debounces and auto-saves mission title and tasks to the backend, tracking hydrated state to avoid unnecessary saves and handling concurrent save requests with a queue.
frontend/src/hooks/useMissionsQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on missions (list, get, create, update, delete, task status updates) with optimistic updates and targeted cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotesQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating notes (by root, folder, or mission) with concurrency-limited creation and targeted cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for file and folder CRUD operations, including paginated file fetching by location (root, folder, mission) and concurrency-limited uploads.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Hook that reads the user's `prefers-reduced-motion` media query preference and returns a boolean that updates reactively on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechToText.ts: A React hook that wraps the Web Speech Recognition API to provide speech-to-text functionality, supporting continuous listening, interim results, and error handling with callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useStackedFiles.ts: A Zustand store hook for managing a stack of selected FileMetadata objects, with actions to add, remove, and clear files.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: A React hook that detects left/right swipe gestures via pointer events, triggering callbacks based on configurable distance and velocity thresholds.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, notes, and missions accent colors.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main home page component managing state for folders, missions, file stacking, bulk selection, upload tracking, and animated transitions between full-screen views via an OrbitDock navigation.
frontend/src/utils/actorInitializationMe: Utility module providing constants and functions to classify and serialize backend actor initialization errors, including stopped canister, invalid token, and not-ready states.
frontend/src/utils/externalOpen.ts: Utility functions for opening URLs externally, downloading files or notes, and sharing files via the Web Share API, with popup-block detection using page visibility events.
frontend/src/utils/fileBytesWorkerSingle: Singleton class managing a Web Worker for reading file bytes, with a concurrency limit of 3 simultaneous requests and an internal queue for overflow.
frontend/src/utils/fileOpenRules.ts: Determines how a file should be opened (in-app viewer vs. direct download) based on its MIME type category, with helper functions for common checks.
frontend/src/utils/filePreview.ts: Categorizes files by MIME type into image, video, pdf, office, or unsupported, and provides helpers to check previewability and get human-readable type labels.
frontend/src/utils/missionCompletion.ts: Provides utilities to calculate mission progress percentage, determine if a mission is completed, and split a mission list into incomplete and completed groups.
frontend/src/utils/missionTaskCompare.ts: Exports a BigInt-safe equality function for comparing two Task arrays by taskId, task text, and completed status without using JSON.stringify.
frontend/src/utils/performanceDiagnostic: Opt-in performance diagnostics singleton that times operations and logs durations to the console, enabled via localStorage flag or URL parameter.
IndexedDB-backed upload queue that persists file bytes, progress, and completion state across sessions, with a 50MB per-file size limit.
frontend/src/utils/reactQueryDiagnostics: Development-only helper that logs React Query mutation lifecycle phases (start, success, error, settled) with timestamps to the console.
frontend/src/utils/smokeTestCoreFlows.ts: Development utility that runs smoke tests against the backend actor for folder, mission, link, and note creation flows, returning structured pass/fail results.
frontend/src/utils/uploadConcurrency.ts: Provides two concurrency limiter factories—a basic one and a cancellable one—that queue async tasks and execute them up to a specified concurrency limit.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/workers/fileBytes.worker.ts: Web Worker that reads a File object's bytes off the main thread and posts back the result (name, MIME type, size, Uint8Array) or an error message.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom CSS-variable-based color tokens (including sidebar, notes, and missions themes), border radii, accordion keyframes, and typography/animate plugins.
frontend/V114_BASELINE_FRONTEND_FILES.tx: A canonical list of all frontend source files that define the v114 baseline, used for validating 1:1 Draft sync and detecting drift.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a mobile app with Upload/Folders/Mission sections and tracking the implementation of an 'Adaptive Orbit Dock' animated bottom navigation component, including architectural notes, existing features, and known issues.
